$doc: RENDERED from core/policy/policy-data.json into Cursor CLI's cli-config.json vocabulary. Merged into ~/.cursor/cli-config.json by bin/leos-merge.py (NOT symlinked — Cursor CLI itself writes allowlist entries into this file). The static deny list covers secret reads only. Catastrophic-shell protection is provided by beforeShellExecution when the installed Cursor build fires that hook; setup must smoke-test it and report the limitation when headless hooks are unavailable.
